NAVAREA XIX 56/16 
  1. RIGLIST. CORRECT AT 09 1830 UTC JUN 16.
NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.
 
71-14.6N - 022-14.8E SCARABEO 8
66-08.4N - 008-13,6 SONGA ENCOURAGE
65-58.1N - 007-48.4E DEEPSEA BERGEN

NOTES:
A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE SAFETY ZONE.
B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW
2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 54/16
